### 🐞 Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is and what it affects.

---

### 📋 Steps to Reproduce
List the steps to make the bug happen:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. See error

---

### 🤔 Expected behavior
What should have happened instead?

---

### 💻 Environment (complete any that apply)

#### Desktop:
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Ventura]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- App Version (if relevant): [e.g. 1.4.2]

#### Mobile:
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 13, Samsung S21]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 17.2]()
